CustomField.description: A key pair mapping that maps the fields between individual program enrollment and individual academic profile in semi-colon separated value e.g., FieldA__c=FieldA__c;FieldB__c=FieldB__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A key pair mapping that maps the fields between individual program enrollment and individual academic profile in semi-colon separated value e.g., FieldA__c=FieldA__c;FieldB__c=FieldB__c.
CustomField.label: Academic Profile Identifier Mapping
